productDisplayName: Reebok Women Easytone Raceon Silver Shoe
description: SANDY WALK FOR SHAPELY LEGSEmulate the feel of walking on sand and shape up your legs and butt with reebok EasyTone Reeinspire II shoes. An absolute hit with those who love that to-die-for body, the reebok EasyTone Reeinspire II sneakers are fitted with balance pods in the outsole that create that mild instability to help you strengthen key muscles of your shins, glutes and feet, and burn those extra calories in style.Moving air that burns caloriesOptimized with Moving Air technology, this shoe activates key muscles in the calves and quads, reducing overall body stress. This innovative fitness shoe is engineered with built-in balance pods in certain points that transfer air in response to your stride. Such air movement creates micro instability with every step you take, forcing the leg muscles to work harder, increasing strength and endurance similar to what happens when walking on sand. Added to this is the DMX Shear cushioning in the Reebok EasyTone Inspire that absorbs shock on impact, enhancing comfort for the feet even during long runs.Added to the DMX Shear technology is the traditional foam base that makes the sneaker three times softer and helps you burn more calories. Even better is its SmoothFit leather and mesh upper that is practically devoid of seams, allowing your feet an abrasion-free ride. The Reebok EasyTone Reeinspire II is also fitted with a removable polyurethane foam insole that absorbs shock and provides ample support to reduce foot fatigue. This also allows you to replace it with an orthotic for desired comfort.With anti-microbial linings covering the insole, you can be rest assured that while you're toning up your legs and butt, your feet are kept dry and fresh, safe from odour and moisture build-up, making it an absolute comfort to walk in.Upper Combination open-weave mesh and synthetic leather upper provides breathable support Padded collar for optimum Fit TPU heel clip for rearfoot support and stability SmoothFit Technology - Hides all seams for an irritation-free fit DMX Max moves air from heel to toe with every well-cushioned step Anti-bacterial lining and sockliner for moisture management Molded PU sockliner with anti-bacterial treatment provides extraordinary cushioning and and moisture management TPU heel clip for rearfoot support and stability Midsole EVA midsole for cushioning and better shock absorption Outsole Outsole Outsole has balance pods in the shoes to create natural instability, encouraging toning through increased muscle activation in three key areas of the leg EasyTone's pockets of moving air technology promote micro-instability thereby helping to improve muscle tone in the glutes, calves and hamstrings Non-marking rubber outsole Shoe care Shoe CareWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
